meaning: n.娘娘腔的男人,先天愚型病人,懦夫,蒙古人[语]adj.蒙古人[语]adj.[医] 患先天性白痴的 Molly 莫利(女子名)
examples: Most Mongolians are Mongol in descent.
By 1206, all the Mongol tribes were ready to recognize him as supreme leader.
In the meantime, a Mongol enemy put his 12-year-old brother on the throne in Fergana.
Monletsgolia are one of 340 teams taking part in the deliberately eccentric Mongol Rally.
The hutong go back almost 800 years and are in fact a Mongol invention.
